commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens voice-call realtime WebSocket upgrade matching to exact-or-slash-child paths and adds webhook regression coverage for sibling rejection and root stream paths.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +118. Total +129 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main and v2026.6.5 use pathname.startsWith(pattern), so /voice/stream/realtime-evil/token classifies under /voice/stream/realtime. I did not run a failing current-main scenario because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is needed; maintainers need to accept the compatibility change and choose the canonical landing path among overlapping open fixes.

target.title: fix(voice-call): require realtime websocket path boundary
target.body:
Summary:
- Tightens realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing so same-prefix sibling paths are not routed to the realtime handler.
- Previously, `/voice/stream/realtime-evil/token` matched `/voice/stream/realtime` because the matcher used `startsWith(pattern)`.
- The matcher now accepts only the exact configured path or a real child path under it.
- Preserves the existing root `realtime.streamPath="/"` behavior so root child paths such as `/token` still route to the realtime handler.

Validation:
- Added regression coverage for sibling realtime WebSocket child paths.
- Added regression coverage for root realtime WebSocket child paths.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`
  - 42 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts`
  - 61 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/live-realtime-route-proof.test.ts`
  - 3 passed

Real behavior proof:
The live proof starts the real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` on `127.0.0.1` with an actual TCP listener, sends raw WebSocket upgrade requests over real sockets, and records whether the realtime upgrade handler was reached.

~~~text
[live-proof] started server base=http://127.0.0.1:41047 pattern=/voice/stream/realtime
[live-proof] attempting raw websocket upgrade path=/voice/stream/realtime-evil/token
[live-proof] result pattern=/voice/stream/realtime path=/voice/stream/realtime-evil/token response="closed-without-response" handlerCalls=0 expected=0 status=PASS
[live-proof] started server base=http://127.0.0.1:37343 pattern=/voice/stream/realtime
[live-proof] attempting raw websocket upgrade path=/voice/stream/realtime/token
[live-proof] handler reached pattern=/voice/stream/realtime request_url=/voice/stream/realtime/token
[live-proof] result pattern=/voice/stream/realtime path=/voice/stream/realtime/token response="HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols" handlerCalls=1 expected=1 status=PASS
[live-proof] started server base=http://127.0.0.1:39363 pattern=/
[live-proof] attempting raw websocket upgrade path=/token
[live-proof] handler reached pattern=/ request_url=/token
[live-proof] result pattern=/ path=/token response="HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols" handlerCalls=1 expected=1 status=PASS

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       3 passed (3)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 9.27s
~~~
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
